conversation.content: Let's establish an airport management regulation. Today we are going to learn about the Exodar Airport Management Regulations in the world of Azeroth; it concerns flight safety.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.

The core rule of this regulation is: those who unauthorizedly start a spaceship engine will be fined 250 gold coins and have their pilot's license revoked for one year; if it causes airway chaos, the fine will be doubled and an additional thirty days of imprisonment will be added.
I have written down the rules of this regulation.
The application scenario of this rule is the Exodar runway and all Naaru airports.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this rule.
